401	pub(crate) enum ScssCapability {

Implemented the fix.

What changed:
- Updated `crates/biome_css_parser/src/syntax/block/declaration_or_rule_list_block.rs`
- The speculative nested-rule parse in styled CSS snippets now validates nested rule completion against `}` instead of the surrounding list’s `end_kind`.
- This fixes styled-template parsing when a nested selector is followed by another top-level declaration, e.g.:

```css
div:first-of-type {
  color: black;
}
background: black;
```

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression case reproducing the bug.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Applied the parser fix.
- Confirmed the regression case passed.
- Removed the temporary regression test as requested.
- Re-ran the existing parser test:

```bash
cargo test -p biome_css_parser styled_embedding_accepts_nested_selectors_without_ampersand --lib -- --nocapture
```

Result: passed.

Note:
- I did not commit changes.
- There are other pre-existing/unrelated modified and untracked files in the working tree; I only changed the parser source file listed above.
